source.business_scenario: 大表 customer→address NL(address_id 无高效索引时)
source.redaction_notes: Synthetic Pagila schema; no real customer data

input.sql:
SELECT c.customer_id, a.address
FROM customer c
INNER JOIN address a ON c.address_id = a.address_id
WHERE c.active = 1
LIMIT 50

-- @scenario: 大表 customer→address NL(address_id 无高效索引时)
SELECT c.customer_id, a.address
FROM customer c
INNER JOIN address a ON c.address_id = a.address_id
WHERE c.active = 1
LIMIT 50;

              Rows Removed by Filter: 1
        ->  Index Scan using address_pkey on address a  (cost=0.00..36.30 rows=603 width=24) (actual time=0.006..0.024 rows=55 loops=1)
